name: Sourced Pipeline Diagnostic
description: Investigate why marketing-sourced pipeline dropped. Runs a structured hypothesis tree, narrows to the most likely cause with a confidence rating, and recommends specific actions.
alsoSurfaces: Why did marketing-sourced pipeline drop this period?
Was the drop concentrated in one channel, one campaign, or compound across many?
How confident is the diagnosis, and what evidence supports it?
Which actions should we take to recover, and who should own each?
beforeWeRun: Drop window: current 7 days vs prior 7 days, or custom?
Significance threshold to investigate: 10%, 15%, or 20% drop?

whatYoullGet.name: Drop confirmation
whatYoullGet.desc: Drop magnitude, period boundaries, and severity classification (significant / within variance / compound).

whatYoullGet.name: Primary cause
whatYoullGet.desc: Named primary cause with confidence rating (high / medium / low) and the specific data behind it.

whatYoullGet.name: Hypothesis tree summary
whatYoullGet.desc: Branches as rows with contribution to drop, evidence, and depth investigated: what was ruled in vs out.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommended actions
whatYoullGet.desc: 2–4 specific actions tied to the cause, each naming an owner and a concrete next step.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Canonical model, period boundaries, sources read with row counts, Stage 0 resolutions.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your diagnostic in ~13 min.
